title: rosa canina var. pernteri
intro: Rosa canina var. pernteri, also known as the dwarf wild rose or dwarf dog rose, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. pernteri include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Rosa canina var. pernteri is typically prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
